string 2: *gasp*
This place...

You were supposed to meet an untimely demise, from the
toxic fumes emitted by the poisonous sea.

That dark shadow is an omen of coming despair... A cry from
the future, saying "Go no further",  has distorted time.

Normally that's a power bordering on taboo, but this time seems to be
an exception. Head to the VIP room, the answers you seek await you.

Unfortunately, Homeros is still asleep. But should wake up
again when the Current is back to normal.

We made a promise, you see. We can't go meddling with that
world without good cause.
Still, it's not like we can just leave things as they are, either...

I mean, if even one of us three were to disappear, the
entire balance would be thrown out of whack, right?

Homeros has been preparing something for some time, but is now
unfortunately asleep. You can ask Mirei about it, though.
If Homeros were awake, I bet they'd say something like this:
"Use the power that dwells within you and save the world!"

Once upon a time, a Shellmon who lived on the outskirts of a seaside
village saved an injured Divermon.

Divermon was a Titan, an enemy, but Shellmon's
kindness caused Divermon to open up his heart.
The pair grew closer and formed a deep friendship.

However, the other Titan forces attacked the seaside village without mercy. The
residents were forced to flee their homes, and Shellmon was no exception.

Seeing Shellmon's tears of misery, Divermon had had enough.
He wasn't going to watch his friend suffer anymore.

He stood up to his fellow Titans, and drove their forces out 
of the village.

The Divermon that Shellmon once rescued blossomed into a great
warrior, and took a new appearance.
He is now Neptunemon, and referred to as the ruler of the seas.
Around that time, a certain Digimon appeared in the ocean village.
And Neptunemon did not realize...

This new arrival, Venusmon, was in fact the mature form of
the digimon Neptunemon owed his life to, Shellmon.

Venusmon sent a poison-laced wine to Neptunemon, believing he
was the loathsome titan who stole the oceans from her people.
Neptunemon drank the poison unknowingly.. And perished.

Having learned the truth, Venusmon fell into the depths of
despair, her mind shattered by the weight of her guilt.
At that moment, poison spread throughout the once beautiful ocean...

...transforming its former splendor into a sea of death that
none could approach.

One can only wonder... Was this series of tragic events, 
truly unavoidable...?
